lessons: Re-confirm equipment immediate-expensing threshold (reference line ~12) next cycle - currently unverified.
If עוסק זעיר 30% auto-deduction specifics unconfirmed, tighten next cycle.
Deferred: monthly-VAT mode in vat-summary.py (only noted as limitation this cycle).

blocking_fixes: JUDGE: corrected the monthly-vs-bi-monthly VAT filing-frequency turnover threshold to the verified annual-turnover figure (above it => monthly, at/below => bi-monthly). The higher figure the skill previously used belongs to the SEPARATE detailed-reporting (דיווח מפורט) obligation - do not conflate. Verified verbatim at benporat-cpa.com.
JUDGE: corrected the deductible business-gift ceiling per recipient per year (raised effective January 2024). Verified verbatim at gmcpa.co.il.

EXPERT: Equipment is a depreciable asset (פחת) - capitalize and depreciate over useful life, NOT a same-year full expense. Fixed the category tables in SKILL.md + SKILL_HE.md, added a depreciable-assets section to the reference, and added a Gotcha. Input VAT remains fully reclaimable in the first period. Verified at finka.co.il.

EXPERT: added the seven-year document-retention Must (keep books + supporting docs seven years from end of tax year, or six years from filing, whichever later) to Step 7 and the reference. Verified verbatim at greeninvoice.co.il.

JUDGE evidence: removed the unverifiable kolzchut equipment-threshold snippet and the mis-sourced Form 126 / monthly-VAT snippets; re-sourced each changed fact to a page whose text literally contains the snippet. Form 126 reframed as employer-only (salaried employees) with an 'only if you employ people' caveat; freelancers without employees do not file it.
lessons: Do not conflate the VAT filing-frequency turnover threshold with the detailed-reporting (דיווח מפורט) threshold - they are different obligations with different numbers.
gov.il returns 403 to automated fetchers; CPA-firm pages (benporat-cpa, gmcpa, zscpa) and greeninvoice/finka carry the same figures with quotable snippets - source evidence from those.

The specific low-value equipment cut-off could not be pinned to a single authoritative quotable page; stated the depreciation PRINCIPLE instead and told the user to confirm the exact cut-off with the accountant.
domain-checklist.md is a build-time coverage artifact; it trips the evidence gate via its currency/URL tokens, so it is kept OUTSIDE the shipped skill folder (not in references/).
deferred_minors: Advance payments (מקדמות): osek zair has no advance payments, but the general advance-payment obligation for other self-employed is only implied via the tax calendar; could add an explicit one-line note next cycle.
Clarify the overlap between the osek patur ceiling and the osek zair turnover ceiling (they coincide numerically for 2026 but are different tracks); a one-line disambiguation would help.
